feed.title: SAP Community - SAP BTP, Kyma runtime
feed.subtitle: SAP BTP, Kyma runtime Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: 403 Forbidden error while posting
entry.content:
Whenever i tries to send data from postman to CPI Iflow. It always give me error 403 Forbidden. 

I found this youtube video https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=s6f_ettin5Y it use simple iflow. I tried it still getting same error ??? help me to encounter this.

This is my IFlow very basic. 

 

 

and this is postman error

I am using basic credential of my service instance.

entry.title: Can we use BTP Application URL as an API.
entry.content:
Hi, After deploying project in BTP CAPM.
We got one Application URL that URL, I want to use as an API.
Is it possible, If it is. Then please provide some Idea and Blog.

entry.title: Regarding the integration between SSAM 2310 and Microsoft PowerApps
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have integrated Microsoft Power Apps with SSAM 2310. Currently, when the button is clicked, the Power Apps open in the browser using utilsModule.openUrl(url), and it works fine.

However, our requirement is to open Power Apps within SSAM, similar to an MDK page view, instead of opening outside of SSAM.

Could you please provide suggestions or alternative methods to achieve this task?

Thank you very much in advance,
Kingston. A

SAP HANA service for SAP BTP  , SAP Field Service Management, connector for SAP Business One  
#SAP Service and Asset Manager,   #SAP Mobile Services,  #SAP Mobile Asset Management , SAP BTP, Kyma runtime  , SAP HANA Enterprise Cloud

entry.title: How to utilize the Form built using SAP BTP in SAP Cloud Version 1 (C4C V1)
entry.content:
Dear @membersap ,Experts

After we build the forms in BTP following the link:https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/get-started-with-forms-service-by-adobe-rest-api-in-btp/ba-p/13549791. Is there any way that we can utilize the same forms using generate summary option in SAP C4C V1?

Thanks & Regards,

Vinutha

entry.title: Unable to Use {*} and {**} Operators in APIRule v2alpha1 Paths
entry.content:
I am currently working with Kyma and trying to use the APIRule v2alpha1 Custom Resource to define paths that include {*} and {**} operators as mentioned in the documentation .

example: path: /api/{*}/details/{**}

However, when I try to apply this configuration, I get the following error:

The APIRule "multiple-services-jwt" is invalid: spec.rules[1].path: Invalid value: "/api/{*}/details/{**}": spec.rules[1].path in body should match '^(\/\*|\/[0-9a-zA-Z/()?!\\_-]+)$'

 

This error suggests that the {*} and {**} operators are not allowed, even though the official documentation specifies that these operators can be used to match paths with dynamic segments.

Thank you in advance for your help!

Best regards,
Abhinav

entry.title: Ask to to configure Windows virtual machine on Kyma runtime to run C# based application
entry.content:
Dear Whom,

My customer wants to configure Windows virtual machine on Kyma runtime to run C# based application that they are using now.
(I think my customer wants to use as-is C# based application continuously as it is on BTP)
As I know, Kyma does not support Windows virtual machine on BTP Kyma runtime.

(https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/virtual-machine-service-in-sap-btp-cf/qaq-p/12686264)

Could you check or introduce a global expert for Kyma runtime?

entry.title: Is the side-by-side BTP training updated with new course content? Found some bugs
entry.content:
Looks like this course contents are updated with different business example.

from risk-management -> incident-management. Unfortunately, we cannot copy code to test by ourselves and demo exercises are not clearly defined. There are few more bugs in the new content.

How to copy code?

Is it announced anywhere that SAP BTP is going to update the course content?

Please guide on this. Thanks.

Ref: https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/build-side-by-side-extensions-on-sap-btp

entry.title: Handling SAP CAP Function Endpoints in Kyma API Gateway APIRule v2alpha1
entry.content:
I am working on an SAP CAP (Java) application deployed in the Kyma runtime. I’m using an APIRule (v2alpha1) to expose my endpoints via the API Gateway.

In SAP CAP, function endpoints looks like this: /api/ProductService/getProductsBySkuAndCountry(sku='201',country='in')

Here’s the relevant part of my APIRule:

 

apiVersion: gateway.kyma-project.io/v2alpha1
kind: APIRule
metadata:
  name: multiple-services-jwt
  namespace: cap-ecomm
spec:
  gateway: kyma-system/kyma-gateway
  hosts:
    - cap-gateway
  rules:
    - path: /api/ProductService/{**}
      methods: ["GET", "POST"]
      noAuth: true
      service:
        name: productv2-svc
        port: 80

 

Issue:

When I try to call the function endpoint, I get a 404 Not Found error. I believe this is due to how the APIRule path-matching mechanism works.
But if i change the path: /*, it works fine. But i don't want to do that.

How to handle this?

Thank you in advance for your help!

Best regards,
Abhinav

entry.title: How to Set Up a Realistic SAP S/4HANA Practice Environment?
entry.content: What are the best ways to set up a realistic SAP S/4HANA test environment for learning? I want to work hands-on with tools like SAP Process Builder, ABAP, and cloud deployment in a way that mirrors real-world usage. Are there affordable sandbox or REALISTIC trial options available for this (including SAP Joule and all the products that are part of a full SAP license)?

entry.title: Planning for the Future: Insights on Transitioning from SAP C4C Sales Service Cloud V1 to V2
entry.content:
As we step into 2025, we are actively planning for the future of our SAP CX landscape and evaluating the transition from C4C V1 to V2. Currently, we have a globally live SAP C4C system with a mix of medium to complex PDI developments.

We are eager to hear from others who have successfully made this shift! Specifically, we’d love to learn about:

  • Your migration journey: How was the process of transitioning from V1 to V2?
  • Required tools and skills: What expertise did your team need? Did you leverage any specific tools or frameworks for the transition?
  • Change management strategies: How did you handle change management, both for development processes and for end-users?

For context, our team has solid experience Technically with : SAP CI (aka CPI), Kyma, and a basic understanding of BAS and CAP and 

Functionally : Lead to Order Processes.

We are looking for holistic insights into the implementation, challenges, and best practices for maintaining and optimizing the system post-migration.

Looking forward to engaging discussions and learning from your experiences!

Best regards,
Dhruvin

entry.title: Simplest Way to Restore Resources After a Kyma Cluster Expires on SAP BTP
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’m using SAP BTP Kyma Runtime, and my cluster will expire soon. I don’t use Persistent Volumes,

my data is only in Kubernetes objects like Deployments, ConfigMaps, and Secrets.

Question:

What is the simplest way to transfer resources from the current Kyma cluster to a new one after the old cluster is gone?

I know Kyma does automatic backups for Kubernetes objects, but:

  1. Can I restore these backups myself?
  2. Is there a simple, SAP-recommended way to migrate resources?
  3. Should I use a tool like Velero to manage backups?

Thanks for your help!

entry.title: Issue while trying SAP BTP, Kyma runtime mission
entry.content:
Hello There,

I am trying the mission: "Build an Application in SAP BTP, Kyma Runtime". Mission is located at:

https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/cp-kyma-mocks.html

I am using Trail account for this mission. I am running in to following three issues:

1. In step 7 of section "Deploy Commerce Mock Application in SAP BTP, Kyma Runtime", once I go back to "Cluster Details" page then I do not see Integration > Applications.

2. I am not able to add new modules that are prequisite for the section "Use Redis in SAP BTP, Kyma Runtime to Store and Retrieve Data". If I try to search for any of the following modules: Serverless, Eventing, or NATS. I do not get results.

3. In step 1 of "Use Redis in SAP BTP, Kyma Runtime to Store and Retrieve Data", once I click Upload, it never finishes.

Is it possible that the documentation of this mission is outdated?

Thanks,

entry.title: need guidance to connect SAP Business One Service Layer with SAP Business Application Studio
entry.content:
I am trying to make a SAPUI5 application on top of the SAP Business One Service Layer,
 and I am following this tutorial 
https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/developing-extensions-for-sap-business-one-and-the-web-client/setting-up-an-sap-btp-destination-for-service-laye

i have created a Destination in SAP Cloud Platform (Cloud Foundry Environment), but I am getting the Failure reason: "Could not check at the moment. Please try again later"

The same configuration works fine in that tutorial.

Any clues?

entry.title: Custom Extension in an MDK App (Using Metadata Approach)
entry.content:
Hello Experts,
I am trying to create a custom extension for SSAM 2310. I followed this  Create Extension Controls  documentation, but I encountered a problem. My workspace contains two projects: one is the standard SSAM 2310 metadata, and the other is ZComponent(ZSSAM2310), where I have made all the modifications.

I created my custom extension within the ZComponent(ZSSAM2310) project. However, I am getting a 'Failed to find module' error with the specific extension location.

How can I resolve this issue? Could you please provide some insights or suggestions on how to create and access the extension from ZComponent in my SSAM application?

SAP HANA service for SAP BTP  , SAP Field Service Management, connector for SAP Business One  
#SAP Service and Asset Manager,   #SAP Mobile Services,  #SAP Mobile Asset Management , SAP BTP, Kyma runtime  , SAP HANA Enterprise Cloud 

Thank you very much in advance,
Kingston. A

entry.title: How to mashup and combine external entity with custom entity for BTP CAP?
entry.content:
I have constructed SBS application which consumes the external service data using destination from SaaS SAP system. Now I would like to use some custom properties of my own together with ready entity definition from external service. Unfortunately, I have error when I try to combine. Using "extend" or "extend projection" does not work either.

Is there anyway how to fix this issue? Thanks.

Entity definition:

entity getPromoCustom as select from ex.Promotions {
    key promotionID,
    promotionName,
};
extend getPromoCustom with {
    salesOrg   : String(4);
    distChain  : String(4);
};
 
Error:
Use ‘extend projection’ to add select items to the query entityCDS (compiler)(extend-query)

entry.title: How to Edit and Annotate an Image in SAP MDK?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I have a requirement in SAP MDK where an image is displayed on a mdk page, and I need to:

  1. Edit the image directly within the app.
  2. Add inline annotations, such as text or highlights, on top of the image.

Is there any standard control or feature in SAP MDK to achieve this functionality? If not, are there any compatible NativeScript plugins or workarounds to implement this in SAP MDK?

Any guidance, documentation links, or examples would be greatly appreciated!

Thank you,
Divan Wellalage

entry.title: Can we upload a docker compose file to BTP Cloud Foundry?
entry.content:
I want to deploy a Chatbot application to Cloud Foundry of BTP. I have this application in a docker-compose.yml file which has five different services mentioned and all services are dependednt on each other. Basically, it creates five different container in Docker which eventually makes an application run on a defined port. 

I would like to know if there is any possibility to deploy the application with Docker compose file?

Also let me know, if there is any other way to deploy such application. 

Thank you

entry.title: Cannot find BAPI in Action.
entry.content: Can Anyone tell me the solution regarding how to call BAPI

entry.title: Optional parameters for OData Functions or Actions in cds definition (CAP with Java)
entry.content:
Hi Everyone, 

I'm working on a BTP service using CAP with Java, and need some help with OData functions. Here's a simplified version of what I have in my `service.cds`:

function testfunction(id: String, secondparam: String) returns String;

The issue I'm facing is that both `id` and `secondparam` are required parameters. However, I want secondparam to be optional. Currently, if I omit `secondparam` when calling the function, I get an error.

Does anyone know how to make the `secondparam` optional in this case? Any guidance or examples would be greatly appreciated!

Thanks in advance! 😊

entry.title: How to perform Remote Table Replication if the HDI Container is created from Kyma Environment?
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to perform Remote Table Replication and have successfully achieved this in the Cloud Foundry environment. However, my main goal is to perform the same for an HDI Container created in the Kyma environment.

The challenge I’m facing is that in the SAP HANA Cloud Database, when I navigate to Add Instance > HDI Container, I can only see containers created in the Cloud Foundry environment. The containers created in the Kyma environment are not visible, which eventually prevents me from setting up Virtual Tables and Remote Subscriptions.

Could you please guide me on how to achieve this?

Thanks,
Abhinav
